_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Conflicting internal indicators and a compressed-but-not-cheap valuation keep price pinned in Anxiety chop until either a momentum shift or sustained stablecoin growth breaks the stalemate.
next_move.brains_agree: No — the analyst calls HOLD with low conviction while the narrative writer implies an impending UP move toward a relief rally.
